description: Semantic layer: quantized Hugging Face transformer model loading (4-bit/8-bit bitsandbytes), with embedding generation (mean pooling, single/batch) via EmbeddingGenerator context manager.
oracle_notes: Archived after verifying the repo-side semantic model-loader and embedding surfaces, including quantization configuration, fallback loading behavior, mean-pooling helpers, batch embedding APIs, and offline tests that avoid model downloads.
